svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="YAT scenario authoring" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="postha-multiaz" name="YAT — End of AT3 (HA-hardened, multi-AZ)"> <mxGraphModel dx="1965" dy="1340" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1900" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Network Topology — HA-Hardened (LMS in AWS, multi-AZ; campus services on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1820" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=14;" value="Internet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="780" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="firewall" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Edge Firewall / Router
(redundant — no SPOF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="370" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=12;" value="VPN Server
(staff-only remote access)
SPOF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2svpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Site-to-Site VPN
Campus ↔ AWS
LDAP back-traffic + ICT mgmt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="640" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_int_fw" edge="1" parent="1" source="internet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="firewall"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_vpn" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;" target="vpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_s2s" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;strokeWidth=2;" target="s2svpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E0F2F1;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Staff Network Zone (on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="720" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B2DFDB;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=12;" value="Staff Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="260" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_staffsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="staffsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 1
AD / DHCP / DNS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="70" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 2
AD / DHCP / DNS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="260" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sysmgmt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="System Management Server
Monitoring + nightly backups" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="450" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsvc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Application Services Server
Accounting / Office Admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="70" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstaff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Staff Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="290" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lmsremoved" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="(LMS Server decommissioned
at cutover — now in AWS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="530" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Staff Desktops
~25 × Windows 10 Enterprise (AD-joined)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="70" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mfp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Multifunction Printers
~5 staff locations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="410" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc1" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc2" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_sysmgmt" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="sysmgmt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_appsvc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="nasstaff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="staffpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_mfp" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="mfp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Student Network Zone (on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="380" x="780" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=12;" value="Student Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="850" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_studentsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="studentsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstudent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Student Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="810" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Student Desktops
~80 × Windows 10 Enterprise
+ O365 Education (AD-joined)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="810" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="classprinter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Classroom Printers
~15 — one per classroom" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="810" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_nas" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="nasstudent"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="studentpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_print" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="850" width="680" x="1190" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="VPC 10.0.0.0/16" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="790" width="640" x="1210" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="igw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontSize=11;" value="Internet Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="1230" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;" value="VPN Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="1670" y="370" as="geometry" /> 10.0.1.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="280" x="1240" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="natgwa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;" value="NAT Gateway (AZ-a)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="1260" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="albnotea" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="ALB target in AZ-a" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="240" x="1260" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pubsubb" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="public-web-b

Windows Server 2016 + DOODLE
ASG member" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="240" x="1260" y="675" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsubb" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="private-app-b

Windows Server 2016 + DOODLE
ASG member" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="240" x="1570" y="675" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="asg_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="Auto Scaling Group (cross-AZ) · min=2, max≥4, target-tracking on CPU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="590" x="1240" y="815" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="datasuba" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBEE;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="private-data-a
10.0.21.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="280" x="1240" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rdsprimary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="RDS for MySQL — PRIMARY
Multi-AZ deployment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="1260" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="datasubb" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBEE;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="private-data-b
10.0.22.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="280" x="1550" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rdsstandby" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="RDS for MySQL — STANDBY
Synchronous replication
Auto-failover < 2 min" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="1570" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rds_replication" edge="1" parent="1" source="rdsprimary" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" target="rdsstandby" value="synchronous replication"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_alb_ec2a" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;" target="ec2a"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_alb_ec2b" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;" target="ec2b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2a_rds" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2a" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;" target="rdsprimary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2b_rds" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2b" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;" target="rdsprimary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3backup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF59D;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="S3 — Cross-Region backup copy
(ap-southeast-2 → ap-southeast-4)
automated daily" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="1410" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rds_s3" edge="1" parent="1" source="rdsprimary" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;" target="s3backup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_natgwa_ec2a" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2a" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;" target="natgwa"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_natgwb_ec2b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2b" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;" target="natgwb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend — HA hardening summary
━━━ On-prem network plumbing
━━━ Site-to-Site VPN (LDAP + ICT mgmt)
Cross-AZ ALB → ASG (min=2) → Multi-AZ RDS with synchronous replication and automatic failover
Per-AZ NAT Gateways · Cross-Region S3 backup copy · Independent failure domains per AZ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="640" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

Campus ↔ AWS

div.div:
Legend — HA hardening summary
━━━ On-prem network plumbing
━━━ Site-to-Site VPN (LDAP + ICT mgmt)
Cross-AZ ALB → ASG (min=2) → Multi-AZ RDS with synchronous replication and automatic failover
